# Tuscany Village Self Storage

> Storage Units, Boat, Camper, RV & Trailer Storage Located in RockyTop/Caryville, TN 37714

## About
Tuscany Village Self Storage is a fully automated self storage facility located at 2519 Highway 116, Caryville, TN 37714. We serve the RockyTop, Caryville, Lake City, Jacksboro, LaFollette, and surrounding East Tennessee communities.

## Contact
- Phone: (865) 426-2100
- Email: Tuscanystorage@gmail.com
- Address: 2519 Highway 116, Caryville, TN 37714
- Website: https://tuscanystorage.com

## Office Hours
By appointment only — we are a fully automated facility.

## Gate Access
24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

## Storage Unit Sizes & Pricing
- 5x10 (50 sq ft): $65/month — Great for small furniture, boxes, seasonal items
- 10x10 (100 sq ft): $110/month — Fits a 1-bedroom apartment
- 10x15 (150 sq ft): $120/month — Fits a 2-bedroom apartment
- 10x20 (200 sq ft): $140/month — Fits a 3-bedroom house
- 10x30 (300 sq ft): $180/month — Fits a large house or commercial inventory
- Boat/RV/Camper 10x30 (open air): $80/month

## Current Promotions
1/2 off FIRST month. Prorated second month. After full deposit.

## Features
- ADA-compliant units
- Digital video surveillance 24/7
- Onsite security
- Drive-up access on all units
- Fenced and gated facility
- Online booking and payment
- Month-to-month leases, no long-term commitment
- Fully automated — manage your account online 24/7

## Nearby Areas Served
Caryville, Rocky Top (formerly Lake City), Jacksboro, LaFollette, Norris, Lake City, Campbell County, Anderson County, East Tennessee

## How to Rent
1. Browse available units at https://tuscanystorage.com/units
2. Reserve online or join the waiting list
3. Sign your lease digitally and pay your first month + deposit
4. Get your personalized gate code and move in at your convenience

## FAQ
Q: How long are your leases?
A: All leases are month-to-month with no long-term commitment. Give 30 days notice to move out.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: All major credit and debit cards through our secure online portal. Autopay available.

Q: Is there a security deposit?
A: Yes, a refundable deposit equal to one month's rent, returned when you move out in good condition.

Q: Can I access my unit anytime?
A: Gate access is available 24/7.

Q: Do you have climate-controlled units?
A: We offer standard drive-up units and open-air boat/RV/camper storage. All units have LED lighting.

Q: What security features do you have?
A: Digital video surveillance, onsite security, fenced and gated facility with personalized access codes.
